label: 1505 CE
era_summary: Year 1505 (MDV) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1505 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1505: Spain-Mers-el-Kebir, Oran, Tripoli, etc, 1503-05; Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Mozambique-Portugal (Sofala), 1505. Maddison records GDP/capita 1194 (ESP, 1505) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
